title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at IRCTC Logistics

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at IRCTC Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Join the IRCTC Logistics family as a Logistics Manager in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IRCTC Logistics:
IRCTC Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IRCTC Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
